name: Emerald Resources Nl
analysis: EMR's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 28% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.0× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$5.8500, stop A$4.6926, target A$6.6200 (0.67:1) — then trail it.
